headlines.title: Nato criticises Russia's 'reckless behaviour' after drone hits Romanian apartments, injuring two
headlines.summary: Romania says this is the 'most serious' incident in its territory since the start of the Russia-Ukraine war, which has seen drones from both sides hit Nato countries in the region.

headlines.title: Netanyahu says he has directed IDF to increase control of Gaza to 70%
headlines.summary: The expansion in control by Israel would contradict the terms of the ceasefire Israel and Hamas agreed to in October 2025.

headlines.title: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
headlines.summary: US officials earlier told the BBC that the framework of a ceasefire extension deal had been agreed, pending the approval of Trump and Iran's leadership.

headlines.title: Russian drone targeting Ukraine goes astray, crashes into apartment building in NATO member Romania
headlines.summary: With a stalemate in Ukraine and discontent at home, Putin seems ready to escalate his war.

headlines.title: Blue Origin rocket explodes on the launch pad during an engine-firing test
headlines.summary: Explosion of Blue Origin New Glenn rocket at Cape Canaveral is a setback for the company and for NASA's Moon plans.

headlines.title: Eight students arrested in Kenya after suspected deadly school arson attack
headlines.summary: Sixteen pupils died in the fire that ripped through a dormitory while they were asleep.

headlines.title: Man jailed for 15 years over plot to attack Taylor Swift concert in Vienna
headlines.summary: A 21-year-old Austrian man is found guilty of planning the attack and other terrorism-related offences.

headlines.title: Survival before safety for Delhi's poor as temperatures hit 45C
headlines.summary: As temperatures peak, Delhi's informal workers continue working despite growing health risks.

headlines.title: Judge refuses to block Trump order to limit mail voting
headlines.summary: There's no immediate effect on the midterms. Trump's DOJ also sued 4 Democratic-run states over denying undercover license plates for federal agents.

headlines.title: Treasury Secretary Bessent confirms limited steps toward a $250 bill featuring Donald Trump
headlines.summary: Confirmation of steps toward creating a new $250 denomination bill.
